Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class BankRelationship

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.BankRelationship
public class BankRelationship extends Object
BankRelationship - A relationship between a bank account and an Apex account.

      public BankRelationship(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BankAccount> bankAccount, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime, Optional<String> name, Optional<String> nickname, Optional<String> plaidProcessorToken, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BankRelationshipState> state, Optional<? extends BankRelationshipVerificationMethod> verificationMethod)

    • BankRelationship

      public BankRelationship()

  • Method Details

    • bankAccount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BankAccount> bankAccount()
      The bank account for the relationship. This field must be set on create requests **except** when using the `PLAID_TOKEN` verification method. In which case, the bank account will be retrieved by the service based on the `plaid_processor_token`.

    • createTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime()
      Creation time of the bank relationship.

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The resource name of the bank relationship.

    • nickname

      public Optional<String> nickname()
      The nickname of the bank relationship.

    • plaidProcessorToken

      public Optional<String> plaidProcessorToken()
      A processor token from Plaid (vendor). Required if using `PLAID_TOKEN` verification method.

    • state

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<BankRelationshipState> state()
      The state of the bank relationship.

    • verificationMethod

      public Optional<BankRelationshipVerificationMethod> verificationMethod()
      The verification method of the bank relationship.

    • builder

      public static final BankRelationship.Builder builder()

    • withBankAccount

      public BankRelationship withBankAccount(BankAccount bankAccount)
      The bank account for the relationship. This field must be set on create requests **except** when using the `PLAID_TOKEN` verification method. In which case, the bank account will be retrieved by the service based on the `plaid_processor_token`.

    • withBankAccount

      public BankRelationship withBankAccount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends BankAccount> bankAccount)
      The bank account for the relationship. This field must be set on create requests **except** when using the `PLAID_TOKEN` verification method. In which case, the bank account will be retrieved by the service based on the `plaid_processor_token`.
